title: rubus sciocharis var. microphyllus
intro: Rubus sciocharis var. microphyllus, also known as the Dwarf Himalayan Raspberry, is a lesser-known species of the Rubus genus, which is a group of flowering plants in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus sciocharus var. microphyllus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
